prompt: Edit the supplied warm living-room background into a product-led editorial cover while using the supplied official SwitchBot Blind Tilt photograph as a strict identity and geometry reference. Preserve the room, concealed-headrail roller shade, natural oak, and dark-green accents. On the oak console, place the real Blind Tilt kit as a carefully arranged product still life at realistic scale. Preserve one slim white cylindrical motor body with its side clamp, vertical shaft and compact top clamp, the separate rounded-rectangular white solar panel, and the thin connecting cable. Do not merge components, turn the motor into a rectangular box, add parts, omit the solar panel, mount it incorrectly, or invent hardware. Use restrained contact shadows. No text, phone, hub, UI, chart, graph, diagram, network line, routing overlay, translucent panel, inset frame, floating card, progress bar, badge, or border.
